# CapCut 8.7 Windows synthetic storage fixture

This is a minimal synthetic regression fixture derived from the storage behavior reported in issue #35. It is not an app-created project bundle and must not be used to claim full CapCut 8.7 desktop verification.

- `draft_content.json` represents the stale legacy timeline.
- `template-2.tmp` contains the newer canonical timeline in a shallow envelope.

Replace or supplement this fixture when a sanitized reporter-provided folder becomes available.
